metaDesc: Custom web design and SEO for Gastonia and Gaston County businesses: shops, restaurants, trades, and manufacturers. Sites you own outright, no templates.
ogDesc: Custom web design and development for Gastonia and Gaston County. Websites, SEO, and branding you own outright. No templates.
twDesc: Custom web design and development in Gastonia, NC. Websites, SEO, and branding for small businesses, restaurants, and manufacturers in Gaston County.
schemaDesc: Web development and design in Gastonia, NC. Custom websites, SEO, and branding for restaurants, small businesses, trades, and manufacturers in Gaston County, Belmont, Mount Holly, and Cramerton.
heroSub: Custom websites, SEO, and branding for the downtown shops, restaurants, trades, and professional practices of Gastonia and Gaston County. No templates, no lock-in, and you own every line of it.
localH2: Built for Gastonia and the county it anchors.
localP1: Gastonia is the largest city in Gaston County and its county seat, built on textiles and now busy reinventing its downtown. The Loray Mill, a National Historic Landmark, has been redeveloped into apartments and shops, and the downtown FUSE District brings crowds to CaroMont Health Park. It is a working city with real momentum, and its businesses deserve a website that looks the part.
localP2: We build for the people who actually run this city: the restaurant downtown, the contractor covering the county, the shop and the clinic, the small manufacturer competing well past the county line and the Charlotte metro next door. Every site is designed and coded around your business, not stamped out of a template.
mapMetaLine: Serving Gastonia, Belmont, Mount Holly, Cramerton, Dallas & the Charlotte metro
citiesIntro: Rooted in Gastonia, working across the region. Explore a nearby town:
hereCard: Downtown shops, restaurants, and county-seat professional services. Sites that bring customers through the door.

neighborCards.name: Mount Holly

neighborCards.name: Cramerton
neighborCards.desc: A mill-town turned riverfront community with small businesses building their reach online.

faqOutsideAnswer: Yes. We serve Gaston County, Belmont, Mount Holly, Cramerton, Dallas, Bessemer City, and throughout North Carolina, all done remotely with recorded walkthroughs.
faqBusinessesAnswer: Downtown restaurants and retail, trades and contractors, professional practices, nonprofits, and manufacturers across Gaston County.
